title: Real Property Owned and Leased by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts 2025 Report

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Division of Capital Asset Management and Maintenance (pursuant to Section 39 of Chapter 7C of the General Laws) submitting listing of the Commonwealth’s real property holdings and leased property as of February, 2026
